subject: Analyze and document how skills work end-to-end
description:
Read the skill files in `plugin/skills/` — specifically plan, execute-story, and init. Also read any hook files in `plugin/hooks/`. Produce a document at `docs/skill-system.md` covering:

1. SKILL.md frontmatter format and all supported fields
2. How skills are discovered and loaded by Claude Code
3. The task table format and dependency resolution
4. How `$0` argument substitution works
5. How `!` bang commands embed script output
6. The collaboration pattern (AskUserQuestion loops)
7. Hook lifecycle (pre-tool-use, post-tool-use, session start)
8. How skills invoke sub-scripts (find.js, create-story.js, worker.js)

Cross-reference actual skill files to illustrate each concept.
doneWhen: docs/skill-system.md exists with comprehensive coverage of all 8 sections.
